data.title: Lab page: Research & Writing archive with document badges

data.body:
Populate the Lab page (/lab) with research and writing documents linked from fractalnyc.com. Each document gets a badge — short rectangular container similar to the banner/avatar badge design language. Template coming from Jules.

Sources to check for document links:
- Current fractalnyc.com lab/research section
- Fractal OS synthesis doc (references Andrew's Substack, Ivan's 'Nothing Human', Unblocked podcast, etc.)
- src/data/houses.ts externalLinks for the lab house (currently empty)

Known documents from synthesis:
- Andrew's Substack (65 posts, 6 years)
- Ivan Vendrov's 'Nothing Human' (Tyranny of the Marginal User, The Cooperation Machine, Metrics as Cowardice, Modernity Decouples, Cultural Drift)
- Unblocked coaching podcast
- Crystal's content (tweets, video, audio)

Jules to confirm full list of links and provide badge template.

Implementation complete. Created: src/data/lab-documents.ts (data model with 9 documents, DocumentCategory type, tags for FRAC-48), src/components/lab/DocumentBadge.tsx (clickable card with category icon, Lab color accent, featured variant), src/components/lab/DocumentGrid.tsx (responsive grid with FadeIn stagger). Updated src/pages/LabPage.tsx with full layout: HouseBanner, description, Research & Writing archive. Typecheck passes. Pushed to frac-47-lab-archive.

REVIEW PASS (with inline fix).

Reviewed: plan file, git diff (master...frac-47-lab-archive), typecheck, all 9 external URLs.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. Lab page renders house banner, description, and document archive -- PASS
2. Each document is a clickable badge linking to external URL -- PASS (all 9 URLs return HTTP 200)
3. Featured documents are visually prominent -- PASS (larger padding, text, description shown)
4. Badges show title, author, category icon, external link indicator -- PASS
5. Mobile-first: single column at 375px, grid on larger screens -- PASS
6. Tags included in data model for FRAC-48 -- PASS (tags array + getDocumentsByTag helper)
7. FadeIn animations applied -- PASS

TYPECHECK: Clean, zero errors.

INLINE FIX APPLIED: hover:border-[LAB_COLOR]/40 used a dynamic template literal that Tailwind JIT cannot detect at build time. Hardcoded to hover:border-[#6B4C9A]/40. Committed as separate fix commit (5a7bedb).

MINOR NOTES (not blocking):
- Plan specified PretextParagraph for lab description; implementation uses plain p tag. PretextParagraph exists in codebase. Consider switching in a follow-up.
- Plan mentioned featured variant spans 2 cols on desktop. Current impl puts featured docs in a 2-col grid (1 each), which looks correct with exactly 2 featured docs but would not span full width with 1 featured doc. Acceptable for current data.

## Badge Template

**Reference:** /Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/2026-04-02/home - research writing badge directory.png

**Design:**
- Square cards (roughly 1:1 aspect ratio) in a 3-column grid
- Corner pin details (same pinned-photo style as avatar badges)
- Solid color fill from the house/site palette — no images for now
- Cream background between cards
- Two variants to explore:
  1. **Simple badge:** title + color tag (category/house association)
  2. **Expanded badge:** title + short description + color tag
- Cards should be clickable (link to the essay/podcast/video)
